gridder/tsx/components/modal/AddToCartBu.text: If your product has variations, this will only show a "Select Options" button that leads to the product page, instead of a "Add to Cart" button.
Change the appearance of this button in "Customize" → "WooCommerce" → "Buttons".
– Variable product (will only show "Select Options" button)

gridder/tsx/components/modal/CarouselMod.text:
Phone breakpoint only. Examples for valid values:
"200px", "100vh", "100svh", "100vh - 50px", "100svh - 50px", "auto"

gridder/tsx/components/modal/ClassesHtml.text: HTML classes and ids can't contain special characters and can't start with a number. An id needs to be unique on its page. You can assign multiple classes separated by spaces but you can only assign one id.

gridder/tsx/components/modal/CreatePhone.text: Does not copy empty rows, vertical lines, row backgrounds.
Stack elements on top of each other

gridder/tsx/components/modal/CustomRowHe.text: "vh" is viewport height. For example 100vh is 100% of the browser height.
Valid units: px, vh, vw, svh, lvh

gridder/tsx/components/modal/DeletePhone.text: You'll just have the standard phone layout then.

Choose rows that should expand/collapse on click.
In the Gridder, on each row there is a number, so you know which number to expand/collapse here.
To collapse a row, right-click it and choose "Collapse Row".

gridder/tsx/components/modal/HTML5VideoM.text: Using your custom icon set in "Lay Options" - "Video" Section
In a Carousel a HTML5 video will always autoplay. If you need sound for your video, check "Show Unmute/Mute Button".
Autoplaying videos must be muted. If you need sound for your autoplaying video, check "Show Unmute/Mute Button".
Videos in marquees will always autoplay, loop and are muted.

"Amount of news to show" must be set above and can't be 0.

gridder/tsx/components/modal/ProductInde.text: Active Background Color (A product is active means you are on its product-page currently)

gridder/tsx/components/modal/ProductsGri.text: (leave empty to show all) (setting wont be used if "Show Category Filter" is enabled)
(leave empty to show all) (setting wont be used if "Show Tag Filter" is enabled)
For custom order choose "Menu Order" and in "Products", click
Amount of rows to show (0 = show all)
"Amount of rows to show" must be larger than 0.
Customize the appearance of the Category Filter in "Customize" → "WooCommerce" → "Product Thumbnail Grid Category Filter".
Shows a number to the right of each Category Filter, indicating how many Products are in that Category.
Customize the appearance of the Tag Filter in "Customize" → "WooCommerce" → "Product Thumbnail Grid Tag Filter".

When selecting multiple Tags, show Products with "Tag OR Tag" or "Tag AND Tag"? Please note if "AND" is selected, when clicking a Tag Bubble, other Tag Bubbles become hidden that would not produce a result in combination with the selected Tag Bubble.
Show "Clear All" button when a tag was selected

Limit of products to be shown (-1 is unlimited)

gridder/tsx/components/modal/ProjectInde.text: Active Background Color (A project is active means you are on its project-page currently)

gridder/tsx/components/modal/SocialMedia.text: Drag and drop an icon to the right 👍🏻

gridder/tsx/components/modal/StickyModal.text: A sticky element only stays stuck within its row.
To make this work you can place a stack element (+More → +Stack) next to the sticky element.
Put multiple elements inside the stack to create a larger row.
When using horizontal grid in combination with sticky, your element will not be positioned based on the horizontal grid. You can however use the normal alignment buttons

gridder/tsx/components/modal/TemplateMod.text: Replace current layout with page template

gridder/tsx/components/modal/TextFooterM.text: Your text must be unstyled for this to work. In the Texteditor select your text and click "Clear formatting" (eraser button)

Customize the appearance of the Tag Filter in "Customize" → "Project Thumbnails" → "Thumbnail Grid Tag Filter".
